Backup has a log-only json_handler fork (JSONL append to logs/operations.jsonl). Architecture does not use module JSON pattern — backup manages files, not branch state. Pending migration decision.
Auth routing requires importing @api gateway module -- per Phase 4 spec
Type errors from dynamic import guard for Google API -- get_drive_service returns object, Drive API methods unresolvable at static analysis time
googleapiclient.http is a runtime dependency not installed in dev -- guarded by try/except ImportError
Internal helpers called at runtime by upload handler -- not statically reachable from module layer
clean_tracker is called during sync when limit=0 -- runtime path not statically reachable
Legacy path builders (build_versioned_path, build_log_dir, build_drive_path) kept for backward compat and future use
save_project_config is public API surface for settings module (deferred)
list_projects is public API surface for status/discovery commands
format_result is public API surface called by CLI display layer
new_result factory is public API surface for result creation
